title: LSP code actions, inlay hints, signature help, and workspace symbols

source.subject: LSP: code actions, inlay hints, signature help, workspace symbols; protocol and session updates

body:
## Outcome

LSP: code actions, inlay hints, signature help, workspace symbols; protocol and session updates.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **LSP workspace & project graph** (`v02-lsp-workspace`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`158215a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/158215a) — LSP: code actions, inlay hints, signature help, workspace symbols; protocol and session updates
